# Shadowbolt Skirmisher

## Tier 2 Skulk

A crossbow ambusher who strikes from cover, then vanishes before retaliation.

**Motives & Tactics:** Isolate targets, fire from shadows, free when pressured

> Difficulty: 14 | Thresholds: 9/18 | HP: 4 | Stress 4
> ATK: +3 | Crossbow: Far | 2d6+3 phy

## Features

**Lucky - Passive:** The Skirmisher can reroll a 1 on an action roll

**Unseen Strike - Passive:** If the Skirmisher is Hidden when they make a successful standard attack against a target, it deals 2d8+3 physical damage instead of their standard damage.

**Maintain Distance - Passive:** After making a standard attack, the Skirmisher can move anywhere within Far range.

**Cloaked - Action:** Mark a Stress to have the Skirmisher become Hidden until its next attack. Attacks made while Hidden from this feature have advantage.
